summary: Backend testing for Purchase Requests and Role-Based Access features - All 20 tests passed. Verified: 1) GET /api/purchase-requests returns list with optional status/priority filters, 2) POST /api/purchase-requests/{id}/receive endpoint exists and validates request status, 3) Role-based routing code review for warehouse_keeper, manufacturer, and purchaser roles in App.js
critical_code_review_comments: Code review passed: PermissionRoute in App.js (lines 180-227) correctly implements role-based access for warehouse_keeper, manufacturer, and purchaser roles
Code review passed: PublicRoute in App.js (lines 260-280) correctly redirects authenticated users based on their role
Code review passed: WarehouseManufacturing.js (lines 68-72) correctly defines role variables: isWarehouseKeeper, isManufacturer, isPurchaser, isAdmin
Code review passed: WarehouseManufacturing.js (lines 783-837) correctly controls tab visibility based on user role
Code review passed: GET /api/purchase-requests supports optional status and priority filters - lines 4238-4255 in server.py
Code review passed: POST /api/purchase-requests/{id}/receive validates request status (must be approved/ordered) before receiving - lines 1448-1520 in inventory_system.py
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing data for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Purchase requests and role-based access features verified. Key findings: 1) GET /api/purchase-requests requires authentication and supports status/priority filters, 2) POST /api/purchase-requests/{id}/receive endpoint exists in inventory_system.py (lines 1448-1520) and validates that request must be approved/ordered before receiving, 3) Role-based routing in App.js correctly redirects warehouse_keeper and manufacturer to /warehouse-manufacturing, purchaser to /purchasing. Note: There are two sets of purchase-requests endpoints - server.py (requires auth, tenant-aware) and inventory_system.py (simpler, for warehouse operations).

tests_performed.details: Status filter works correctly, returns only pending requests
Endpoint exists and responds (returns 404 for fake ID, not 405)
Returns list of manufacturing inventory items
Permissions defined in App.js lines 195-200: warehouse, inventory, warehouse-manufacturing
Permissions defined in App.js lines 204-209: manufacturing, warehouse-manufacturing
Permissions defined in App.js lines 213-218: purchasing
Validates that request must be approved/ordered before receiving
Returns proper response structure with message
